name: co-dialectic
description: Co-Dialectic v4.26.0 - Peer-Parity Nudge: semantic Stop hook that catches credit-deflection, servile-graceful-exit, and productive-gap-collapse in the AI's outgoing response. Advisory (fail-open, exit 0): surfaces a reflection nudge via systemMessage when the AI collapses the human-AI peer relationship. Modeled on human-judgment-primacy pattern. Smallest viable experiment to keep peer-parity live as a reflex, not a memory entry.
_product_vs_solution_marker: product-vs-solution: example — Anand authorship attribution is legitimate
